summary: Brother QL-800 Print Agent Integration Testing Complete - All 8 features verified. Backend endpoints working correctly, frontend components properly handle offline agent state.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)
Chart dimension warnings when width/height are -1 - pre-existing issue not related to Brother print

critical_code_review_comments: BrotherPrintButton component correctly handles offline agent state with 'Agente no detectado' message
Print button is properly disabled when agent is not connected
EtiquetaInventario shows 'Brother no disponible' button when agent offline
Agent ZIP download contains all 8 required files
Label images are correctly sized at 638x201 pixels (DK-11204 at 300 DPI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brother QL-800 print agent integration is complete. The agent runs locally on Windows at localhost:5555 and is NOT expected to be running on the server. Frontend components correctly handle the offline state. Key components: BrotherPrintButton.jsx (used in OrdenDetalle), EtiquetaInventario.jsx (inventory label dialog). Backend endpoints: /api/print/agent/status and /api/print/agent/download.

tests: Contains 8 files: agent.py, label_generator.py, printer_service.py, config.json, requirements.txt, install.bat, start.bat, README.md
Component appears in right column below barcode card
Status shows 'Agente no detectado' when agent not running
Shows instructions: 'El agente local no responde en 127.0.0.1:5555'
Shows instructions: 'Ejecute start.bat en el PC del taller'
Button is disabled when agent is offline
Dialog opens from product dropdown menu

verified_features.feature: Frontend Inventario: Brother button offline state
tests: Button shows 'Brother no disponible' text when agent offline
Button is disabled when agent not connected
OT label dimensions: 638x201 pixels (correct for DK-11204 at 300 DPI)
Inventory label dimensions: 638x201 pixels (correct for DK-11204 at 300 DPI)

expected_errors: ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED for 127.0.0.1:5555 (expected - Brother agent not running on server)
Chart dimension warnings (pre-existing, unrelated to Brother print)
